name: nextjs-feature-architecture
description: Use whenever building or refactoring Next.js App Router apps with features/, server-first loading, Zod, Server Actions, repositories, and services (Prisma, Drizzle, REST, Connect/gRPC). Use for useEffect fetch refactors, vertical slices, TanStack server bridges, hybrid DB+API — even if the user does not name this skill. Not for styling-only, non-Next.js, or backend-only work.
